component:
<IndexedDbService ref="db" (...)="@@db" invokeApi="<- api@invoke" />
<ItemSearchController ref="itemsSearch" data="<- db@dataItems" />
<ItemsFilterController ref="itemsFilter" meta="@@forms.filter" data="<- itemsSearch@actualData" value="<- nav@params.filter" />
<Connector data="<- itemsFilter@value" change="-> nav.onParams(data | pack:'filter')" />
<ItemCollectionController ref="items" data="<- itemsFilter@actualData" isLoaded="<- db@isLoaded" />
